goal: 把 notes rewrite health 移到 sync 缓存

summary.title: 把 notes health 缓存移到 sync
summary.what: 把 notes rewrite health 从 status/preflight 的实时扫描改成 sync 重建 view 时计算并缓存；status 与 preflight 只读取 view metadata 里的 likely warning。sync 在检测到 likely rewrite drift 时输出 warning，doctor --notes 继续做实时诊断，migrate notes 继续保持显式 dry-run/write/push 流程。
summary.why: status --json 和 preflight --json 是高频入口，不应该为了少数 history rewrite 场景每次扫描 git notes，也不应该在没有 warning 时输出一大段计数噪音。把计算放在 sync 可以复用 view rebuild 已有的 notes/reachability 扫描，同时保留 agent 能发现异常的入口。
summary.user_goal: 把 notes rewrite health 移到 sync 缓存

decisions.chose: 在 sync 重建 view 时计算 NotesHealth 并写入 view metadata
decisions.rationale: sync 已经扫描 notes 与 main reachability，复用这条路径可以避免 status/preflight 高频命令每次扫描 notes。

decisions.chose: 只在 cached likely_history_rewrite 为 true 时输出顶层 notes_health / notes_rewrite_drift warning
decisions.rationale: 健康状态下不向常用 JSON 增加额外计数噪音，异常状态下仍给 agent 明确下一步。

decisions.chose: 不把普通 health 计数放进 LastSync
decisions.rationale: StatusResult 会原样输出 last_sync；把 health 放进去会让 status --json 在健康状态也出现 last_sync.notes_health。

decisions.chose: cached status 只推荐只读 doctor 命令，doctor --notes 保留实时扫描和 migrate 推荐
decisions.rationale: 缓存只适合发现异常；修复共享 notes ref 前仍必须运行实时诊断并显式确认。

rejected.alternative: 让 status/preflight 每次调用 buildDoctorNotesReport
rejected.reason: 这个设计会让热路径成本跟 notes 数量绑定，且对没有 rewrite 的日常调用没有收益。

rejected.alternative: 把迁移写入或 notes push 自动挂到 sync/status 后面
rejected.reason: 修复共享 notes ref 是高影响 Git 操作，必须保留 dry-run 和显式确认。

review_notes: Dogfood：临时仓模拟 10 个 rewrite 后不可达 Mainline notes，sync 写入 view notes_health，status/preflight --no-sync 只读缓存识别 drift。
性能观察：本仓 status --json --no-sync 约 0.21-0.30s，preflight --json --no-sync 约 0.28-0.67s；当前健康状态 status --json 不输出 notes_health。

architectural_claims: Notes rewrite health is a sync-produced view cache, not a status/preflight live diagnosis.
Doctor remains the authoritative live notes diagnosis surface before any migration decision.
Shared notes ref repair remains explicit through migrate notes dry-run/write/push.
behavioral_changes: mainline sync computes NotesHealth while scanning notes and stores it in MainlineView metadata.
mainline sync --json includes notes_health only when likely_history_rewrite is true; human sync prints a warning only in that case.
mainline status and mainline preflight surface notes rewrite drift only from cached view health.
Agent guidance tells agents to run doctor --notes when cached warning appears or when user context mentions force-push/rebase/rewrite symptoms.

data_model_changes.name: MainlineView.notes_health
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Older view caches without notes_health remain valid; the next sync refreshes the field.

migration_notes: No user migration is required; run mainline sync to populate the cached notes health.
